title: Dynamic Discovery Skill Tools
description: Tools for the Macro Analyst to dynamically discover and learn new skills from OpenClaw/WorkBuddy marketplaces.

discover_and_learn_skill.description: Search the skill marketplace and dynamically load a new skill into the agent's context.

marketplace.description: The marketplace to search for the skill.

query.description: Natural language query describing the required skill (e.g., 'real-time fed interest rate probabilities').
